description: Colour blocked id shoes with a canvas upper and a go-anywhere appeal. Crafted from India's finest materials, this low-top pair is perfect for colour-pop styling - a fashion staple. Balance this bright piece with understated denims or pleated chinos for contemporary grounding. Upper Low-top canvas upper with synthetic leather overlay Contrast stitch detailing Central lace-ups Rubber toe box for abrasion free comfort Canvas tongue and fabric lining Midsole PU midsole with reinforced textured foxing on the toe box Outsole Branding and honeycomb patterned grooves on the TPU outsole shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
